SEARCH
Package dev.jeka.core.api.depmanagement

Interface JkDependency

All Known Subinterfaces:
JkFileDependency, JkTransitivityDependency
All Known Implementing Classes:
JkComputedDependency, JkCoordinateDependency, JkFileSystemDependency, JkLocalProjectDependency
public interface JkDependency
Interface standing for a dependency. It can be either :
  • An external module as org.hibernate:hibernate-core:3.0.1
  • A project inside a multi-project build
  • Some files on the file system
  • A process that produces 0 or n files

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Path
    getIdeProjectDir()
    In the IDE, a dependency can be provided by a project exporting it.
    static boolean
    isCoordinate(String pathOrCoordinate)
    Determines whether the given String represents a coordinate or a file path.
    default boolean
    matches(JkDependency other)
    Returns true if the specified dependency matches with this one.
    static JkDependency
    of(String pathOrCoordinate)
    Returns either a JkCoordinateDependency or a JkFileSystemDependency depending on the specified parameter stands for a path or a coordinate.
    static JkDependency
    of(Path baseDir, String pathOrCoordinate)
    Same as of(String) but resolve relative paths against the specified base directory.
    JkDependency
    withIdeProjectDir(Path path)
    Returns a dependency identical to this one but with the specified project base dir.

  • Method Details

    • getIdeProjectDir

      Path getIdeProjectDir()
      In the IDE, a dependency can be provided by a project exporting it. When generating IDE metadata files (.classpath, xxx.iml), it's preferable to mention only the project exporting it rather than dependency itself. This method simply returns null when the dependency is not coming from another project.

    • withIdeProjectDir

      JkDependency withIdeProjectDir(Path path)
      Returns a dependency identical to this one but with the specified project base dir.
      See Also:
      • getIdeProjectDir()

    • matches

      default boolean matches(JkDependency other)
      Returns true if the specified dependency matches with this one.

      Matching means that two matching dependencies can not be declared in a same dependency set as it will be considered as a duplicate or result in a conflict.

      For example "com.google:guava:21.0" is matching with "com.google:guava:23.0" even if they are not equals.

    • of

      static JkDependency of(String pathOrCoordinate)
      Returns either a JkCoordinateDependency or a JkFileSystemDependency depending on the specified parameter stands for a path or a coordinate.

    • of

      static JkDependency of(Path baseDir, String pathOrCoordinate)
      Same as of(String) but resolve relative paths against the specified base directory.

    • isCoordinate

      static boolean isCoordinate(String pathOrCoordinate)
      Determines whether the given String represents a coordinate or a file path.
